title: Shield Stun Sound
description:
This plugin plays a sound for the attacker when they disable the victims sheild.


This plugin is used currently on

DementedPolars
IP: dementedpolars.net

Change The Sound In The Config File

Allowed Sounds: https://jd.papermc.io/paper/1.21.1/org/bukkit/S
